search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: The World's Most Powerful Magnet (Dec 6, 2004, published in the March 2003 issue). Join the Mythbusters for fun with supermagnets. It casts enough magnetic force to slow a locomotive from a quarter-million miles away—the distance of the Earth from the Moon. The magnetar, or magnetic neutron star known as Soft Gamma Repeater 1806.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about magnets and Mythbusters, unrelated to starting a YouTube channel.
